caption: In a medical simulation room, a group of healthcare professionals manages a patient lying on a bed. A woman in blue scrubs and another in a black jacket over blue scrubs stand near the patient's head, while a third person in blue scrubs faces them. The people wear blue nitrile gloves and face masks. Medical equipment, including a red crash cart and monitors, is visible in the background. As the scene progresses, the woman in the black jacket looks down at a white document held by another staff member. A small purple figure and the text "Day 1" appear in the bottom-left corner of the frames, while the text "Sim Week" is positioned in the bottom-right corner. The focus shifts as the participants interact around the patient, examining the paperwork and coordinating their actions in the simulation.
